title: Smoky Smoked Lime Stir-fry
description: A silky-smooth weeknight dish featuring unwaxed lime and a smoky flavor profile that is perfect for those sugar-free-friendly meals.
instructions: Wash and de-stem the limes, then cut them into slices. Slice dumplings if not pre-cut.
Heat vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add lime slices and salt to the hot oil, stir-frying for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Remove the lime slices from the oil when they start to show signs of being cooked, leaving some oil behind.
Stir-fry dumplings in the remaining oil for a couple more minutes until heated through but still have their soft texture.
Fold the stir-fried dumplings and lime into each other, ensuring everything is coated with oil and evenly seasoned. Cook briefly to warm up.
Serve hot as a main course or side dish.
